title: 138-Month Anniversary: Normalistas March in Chilpancingo Demanding Truth
detail: Marking 138 months since the forced disappearance of the 43 students, students from the Normal Rural 'Raúl Isidro Burgos' school in Ayotzinapa held commemorative marches and blockades in Chilpancingo, Guerrero. Demonstrators demanded that President Sheinbaum reveal the whereabouts of the 43 missing normalistas and called for concrete progress from the government's new investigative strategy. Families of the disappeared joined the march, reiterating that over 11 years of official investigations have failed to locate the students or secure meaningful accountability for the military officials involved.
